# substreams-websocket

> Real-time WebSocket fan-out server for Substreams `DatabaseChanges`. Decodes
> blocks from any `db_out`-style Substreams package and broadcasts them as JSON
> to connected WebSocket subscribers. URL conventions mirror Binance market
> streams: stream selectors are `<network>@<stream>` with `*` wildcards on
> either side.

## Connecting

- `wss://<host>/ws/<network>@<stream>` — single stream, raw payloads.
- `wss://<host>/ws/<a>/<b>/...` — multi stream, payloads wrapped as `{"stream":"<id>","data":<raw>}`.
- `wss://<host>/stream?streams=<a>/<b>/...` — query mode, always wrapped.
- Bare `/ws` returns HTTP 400; use `/ws/*@*` to subscribe to every stream.

## Block payload

```
{
  "stream":      "swaps",
  "network":     "solana-mainnet",
  "block_num":   350000000,
  "block_hash":  "Gsk6...",
  "timestamp":   "2026-05-13 17:00:00",
  "module_hash": "bd388f2e...",
  "events": [
    { "@table": "swaps", "input_amount": "1287000000", ... }
  ]
}
```

All event field values are strings on the wire. `@table` identifies the source DB table per row. On reconnect, pass `?from_block=<n>` to receive every retained block with `block_num > n`. Default retention is 1000 blocks per stream; outside that window the server emits a `gap` lifecycle message and clients must backfill via Substreams gRPC directly.

## Live commands

Send a JSON text frame on the connected socket:

```
{ "method": "SUBSCRIBE",         "params": ["solana-mainnet@swaps"], "id": 1 }
{ "method": "UNSUBSCRIBE",       "params": ["solana-mainnet@swaps"], "id": 2 }
{ "method": "LIST_SUBSCRIPTIONS", "id": 3 }
{ "method": "SET_FILTER",        "params": ["solana-mainnet@swaps", {"protocol":"raydium_cpmm","user":["a","b"]}], "id": 4 }
{ "method": "CLEAR_FILTER",      "params": ["solana-mainnet@swaps"], "id": 5 }
{ "method": "LIST_FILTERS",      "id": 6 }
```

Replies are `{"result": null | [...] | {...}, "id": <echoed>}`. Errors are `{"error": "...", "id": <echoed>}` and do not close the socket.

## Event filters

Reduce bandwidth by dropping non-matching events server-side. Pass `?filter=<url-encoded-json>` on the upgrade, or use `SET_FILTER` mid-stream. String equality only; fields AND, values OR; missing-field=miss; zero matches = block skipped. Wildcard selectors never filter. See `/SKILL.md` and `docs/filters.md` for per-stream filter examples.

## Resources

- [SKILL.md](/SKILL.md): full agent-oriented reference.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/pinax-network/substreams-websocket): source, releases, Docker image, Railway recipe.
- `/`: interactive in-browser client (Scalar-style API reference + try-it panel).
